titleStmt.title: SII 7.942: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 942. (A.R. No. 313 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH AND EAST WALLS OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya ticaimukatton paṭaitta perumpuvi viḷaṅka vennum cimeykkirtti muṭiya Eḻuti tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷina śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7vatu mitunanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu traiyodaśi yum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ
ḷanāṭṭut tirumunaippāṭit tiruveṇṇainallūrnāṭṭup piramade yam tiruveṇṇainallūr mahāsabhai yom kūṭal Eḻicaimokan maṇavāḷapperumāḷ vāṇilaikaṇṭānāna kāṭavarāyan Eḻuntaruḷuvi vāḷapperumāḷ vāṇilai
rāyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūril śrīvānavanmātevivatikku meṟkumeṟku is indicated by a symbol.mummuṭicoḻavatikkuvati is expressed by a symbol.vaṭakkuvaṭakku is denoted by a symbol.1- kū 2- kūm 3- kūm Uṭpaṭap panniraṭikkolāl kuḻi 2 10 2 mā I � kiḻakku � Ā 3 māi kiḻakku I nikki nilam 10 9
vati is expressed by a symbol.vatikku meṟkumeṟku is indicated by a symbol. mpi 2- kūm 3- kūm vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 1- mā I � kiḻakku I� kai Akappaṭṭa tiruvāykkulattāḻvār nilam 1- mā rūpāy� kiḻakku n=ta nikki nilam 7- mā I � kiḻakku n=ta- m Āka nilam 2 10 6- mā nūr perumpuṟakkaṭalpaṭṭan kuḻi 3 100 8 10
m perumpāṇṭur kaṟṟuṟaipaṭṭan Uḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 4 100 2 I-m pāṟkuḷattu ciṟiyāṇṭān kuḻi 7 100 8 10 2nta Eṉūr Āṇṭār Uḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 4 100 9 10va- m pāṟkuḷattu śrīnārāyaṇapaṭṭan kuḻi Uḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 7 100 4 10 1va- m miḻalai Āṭkoṇṭatevar Uḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 5 100 5 10 1
m pāṟkuḷattu periyāṇṭānpaṭṭaṉ kuḻi 4 100 6 10 2va- m melāmur tevar Uḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 2 100 7 10 m Eṉūrperumāḷ kuḻi 2 100 5 10 1�- m kavini muttupaṟmanāpapaṭṭaṉ kuḻi 4 100 5 10 7nta- m kommāraip periyāḻvā ṉuḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 4 100 7 10 4- m kavinic ciṅkappirānpaṭṭar kuḻi 6 100 9 10 2va- m kaḷattūr Iruṇikkipaṭṭan U
ḷḷiṭṭār kuḻi 5 100 7 10 8nta- m pāṟkuḷa Irāmapirānpaṭṭan kuḻi 6 100 7 10 6va- m kavinic ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭan kuḻi 3 100 3 10 9 I-m kavini Uy(y)yakkoṇṭapiḷḷai Uḷḷiṭṭārum 3 100 3 10 1 I-m melāmur tevar kuḻi 2 100 6 10 2nta- m pāṟkuḷattu tāmotirapaṭṭan kuḻi 2 100 3 10 1 I-m Āka kuḻi 10000 3 1000 4 100 2 10 1- l nilam 2 10 6- mā � Innilam Irupattāṟumā muk
kāṇi muntirikaikki ḻonpatumāvum Ikkūṭal Eḻicaimokan maṇavāḷapperumāḷ vāḷnilaikaṇṭānāna kāṭavarāyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāna Emmi licainta vilaipporu ḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 1000 6 100 5 10 5va3� Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirat taṟunūṟṟaimpattaiñce yeṭṭumāvum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟik kiḻikaic celavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai
ppiramāṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Ikkūṭal Eḻicaimokan maṇavāḷapperumāḷ vāṇilaikaṇṭānāna kāṭavarāyaṟku Ittiruveṇṇainallūrūrom Itukku Ituve vilaiyāvutākavum Itituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai yāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcelavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātatākavum Ippaṭi vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam ceytukuṭuttom Ikkūṭal Eḻicaimokan maṇavāḷapperumāḷ vāḷnilaikaṇṭāṉ kāṭavarāyaṟku Itinuṭpaṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 7.942 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
